info.description: Data distribution platform for AI analytical systems
info.title: AI Data Analyst

get.description: Admin page for managing permissions and access requests.

post.description: Submit an access request for a table.

get.description: List current user's access requests.
List all pending access requests (admin only).

post.description: Approve an access request (admin only). Auto-grants permission.
Deny an access request (admin only).

Configure data source and instance settings via API.

Writes config to instance.yaml and persists secrets to .env_overlay.
AI agents and the /setup wizard use this instead of manual file editing.

Discover tables from configured source and auto-register them.

Combines discover-tables + register-table into one call.
Skips already-registered tables. Used by /setup wizard and AI agents.

get.description: Discover all available tables from the configured data source.

get.description: List all available tables from table_registry.
Stream a parquet file for download. Supports ETag for caching.
Structured health check. No auth required.
List knowledge items with filtering, pagination, search.
Get governance audit log.

Get corporate memory statistics.

post.description: Execute SQL against the server analytics DuckDB.
Deploy a Python script to be run on the server (optionally on schedule).
Run an ad-hoc Python script (not deployed).
Run a deployed script by ID.

Trigger data sync from configured source. Admin only. Runs in background.

Upload an artifact (HTML report, PNG chart, etc.).

post.description:
Create the first admin user. Only works when no users exist.

This endpoint allows an AI agent to bootstrap a fresh instance
without needing docker exec or SSH. It automatically deactivates
after the first user is created.

Verify a magic link token and issue JWT.
